programme.desc: The prime minister of France has run up a ridiculous tab with Maxim of Paris, and orders the Louvre Museum proprietor to sell a painting to cover his bill. But the proprietor doesn't want to let it go, and takes the painting out of the museum.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin recieves a letter about Marie Antoinette's jeweled crown, and sneaks into the palace of Versailles. A young man called Oscar appears, the sender of the letter.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin was told by Fujiko to steal a pistol of the Wilhem family worth 500 million pounds. Meanwhile, a man named Jim Benkei, a giant of a man who's stirred troubled in London, steals Jigen's favorite Magnum ...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is after the various jewels at the World Fair in Los Angeles. Lupin learns from Fujiko that a man named Harry Satler is also after the jewels, so he decides to go see who this guy is. The man he meets is a wizened old man…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Pestered by Fujiko, Lupin has to steal a golden bed that was originally made by Louis XIV for Josephine. He makes a plan with Jigen and Goemon, but the owner of the bed, Morgan, is a formidable opponent who has WWII military experience.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Heike Clan and Minamoto Clan once battled on Devil's Head Island at the inland sea of Seto; Fujiko and Lupin go there to find out about the details behind the legend of the battle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Vivian dreams of becoming a star some day, but her auditions are a bust. She thinks of using Lupin to become famous; she makes Lupin engage in thievery, and informs reporters to be at the site to catch him in the act.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Louis XIV and Marie Antoinette's Hope Diamond has brought much misfortune on its possessors. The diamond is now safeguarded by a maximum security device. Fujiko provokes Lupin to steal that diamond.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and crew go to a hot spring. Lupin and Jigen relax while Goemon trains at the cliffs. A girl manifests to Goemon and captures Goemon's heart. However, the girl is seeking the secret of his sword, for her swordsmith grandfather…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has to battle a hitman called Tiger. Lupin tries to dodge him, but Tiger is one step ahead of him. Lupin keeps trying to escape him but Tiger is relentless; he has a way of disappearing and appearing at will.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and friends go to have fun at the horse race track, but winning isn't as easy as stealing. Lupin notices two people who are winning big money hand over fist, and gets suspicious.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Catherine rescues Lupin and Jigen, who are pursued by Zenigata as usual. She's an old acquaintance of Jigen's, and provokes Jigen to steal a 140-karat diamond from her own mansion.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Wolf and Rose are a cool hitmen duo with the ambition of rising to the top of the hitman business by killing Lupin. They capture Goemon and torture him to confess about Lupin's weaknesses. Lupin learns that Goemon is in danger.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The chief of the police department accused of mismanagement on Lupin's release, hit the prime minister out of anger and was dismissed. Zenigata thinks that Lupin is the only arrest to avenge the chief's death, and starts an operation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The painting "The First Supper" hides clues to an heirloom that Christ received from Virgin Mary. This painting has been kept by the clan of Judah for generations, and a woman named Nova knows where the painting is hidden.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Mona Lisa never leaves the Louvre Museum. Arsène Lupin tried unsuccessfully to steal her and Lupin III wants her for his collection, however, and fireworks ignite between him and Zenigata in charge of security.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On New Years Eve, Lupin is after is the Golden Treasure Ship at Mount Horai. It's said that the Seven Lucky Gods conferred this treasure, which is shown in public only once a year when the New Year's bell rings at the belfry of Kohoji Temple.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: As usual, Lupin is tossed to and fro by Fujiko. But a man named Buckingham comes to him and sells him "disguise chewing gum" for 50,000 dollars.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the Straw Hats draw closer to the Whole Cake Island, Pedro shares his sordid past in Big Mom's territory - and hatches a plan to win back Sanji and take an item of great worth from the Emperor!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook and Pedro head out in a submersible to infiltrate Big Mom's stronghold! Meanwhile, Luffy, Nami, Chopper and Carrot head into the island chasing the image of Sanji, only to be distracted by the endless supply of sweets and a second Luffy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Lost in the bewildering woods and chasing after Sanji, Nami and the others find there's more than meets the eye in this upside down part of the Whole Cake Island! Meanwhile, Sanji confronts his brother!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy continues to move through the mysterious and dangerous woods, unaware of the danger that lurks in the trees! Meanwhile, Sanji confronts his father as the wounds of his childhood are laid bare!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji faces off against his father in a duel! His powerful kicks aim at protecting his hands, but the Germa Family has more in store for him yet! Meanwhile, Luffy goes deeper into the Seducing Woods and falls for their powerful illusions!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Big Mom has Caesar Clown at her whims - and despite his bilking her out of countless amounts of money - she is ready to continue her pursuit of maniacal world control!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Finally, Nami finds Luffy and recounts her harrowing tale of battling Brulee! Meanwhile, the mysterious half-buried man comes clean about his true identity! But this must all be put aside when one of Mom's most powerful generals comes calling!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The identity of the enigmatic Pound, the man half-buried in the woods, is revealed, but his deep connection to Big Mom might not be enough to save him! Nami's past exploits, however, hold the key to keeping Mom's minions at bay!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy squares off against Cracker, one of the Sweet 3 Generals, as Nami learns the truth about others in the Worst Generation who have come before to challenge Big Mom!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy continues to fight against Cracker, whose powers to manipulate his surroundings may prove more troublesome than he had thought! Meanwhile, Brook and Pedro infiltrate the Whole Cake Island - and must hatch a plan to avoid getting caught!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The wind starts to go out of Luffy's sails as he fights an endless army of Biscuit Warriors! Meanwhile, the oldest two Vinsmoke brothers come home from a war to see their long-missing young brother Sanji.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy starts to run out of steam as the Biscuit Warriors keep multiplying! If he can buy himself 10 minutes to recharge…

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy needs just 10 minutes to recharge! Nami comes to rescue with the help of the Homies! Meanwhile, Sanji learns the terrible truth of Germa's power - and his father's dark history!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami challenges Cracker on her own! During the all-out fight, she loses her advantage and is close to defeat. Can Luffy bounce back in time? Meanwhile, Sanji's tragic childhood is made clear.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The terrible history of Sanji's family continue to unfold. From a rare moment of compassion, he is able to escape, only to face his father's cruelty before setting out on his own.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is in an all-out, all-you-can-eat battle! As Cracker's endless stream of Biscuit Warriors marches on, Luffy's endless appetite is put to the test. Meanwhile, Reiju helps Sanji to straighten himself out before he meets his fiancée.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy needs to think fast in order to turn the battle in his favor - filled with biscuits, he debuts a new Gear Four attack that has lasting repercussions! Meanwhile, Chopper and Carrot find Sanji's reflection, but can they get a message to him in time?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy finally catches up with Sanji! However, as a happy past plays before his eyes in which he, Sanji, and the crew deepened their bonds, a new page is turning in the history of the Straw Hats.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji's journey with the crew looks to be coming to an end!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy makes a solemn promise to not move from his spot until Sanji returns to him. But as Mama's army advances, that promise may prove a costly one. Meanwhile, Sanji and the Vinsmokes come face to face with Big Mom and his bride-to-be Pudding!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy stands his ground and waits for his friend to return! But the vengeful army washes over him - only a true friend can step in to turn the tide of battle! Meanwhile, Sanji and Pudding discuss their marriage - and come to a startling conclusion!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy puts his all into battling Big Mom's vengeful army, however, their skills combined prove too formidable. Meanwhile, Sanji goes to Big Mom herself to bargain for the Straw Hats lives - with shocking results!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper and Carrot are captured by Brulee and strung up for dinner! But Chopper sees a chance to free himself! Meanwhile, Brook and Pedro launch a plan to reach the Ponegliffs - a daring game of chance!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Pekoms creates a diversion for Brook to set his plan into action. Meanwhile, Luffy continues to goad Big Mom into a fight, and Pudding begins to have stirrings of rebellion herself!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Just when Luffy and Nami are in Big Mom's grasp, Pudding arrives, but with news that they aren't expecting - meanwhile Brook and Chopper both make headway getting out of their own jams!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji hopes his wedding with Pudding will solve the Straw Hat's predicament - but Pudding secretly plans to to avoid the marriage, sharing a secret with Luffy. Meanwhile, Brook comes face to face with Big Mom herself!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy tries desperately to free himself as the risk of his own well-being! Meanwhile, Chopper and Carrot continue to search the mirror universe, Brook squares off against Big Mom, and Pedro's past is revealed!

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Still, on Seefra, Dylan finds Harper, who has adjusted to life there, and the mysterious Doyle.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A scientist from the original Commonwealth shows up, caught in a time loop.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Flavin returns, sparking a gang war, and helps Dylan develop as a Paradine.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A crystal that can restore the Andromeda's power is discovered, but in order to get it, Dylan must work for the mine's owner - who uses slave labor.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Tunnels are discovered on Seefra which can be used to reach eight other Seefra planets.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: When an old man is killed, Beka, Rhade, and Harper are the main suspects and stand trial.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Rhade leads the rebels in a battle against a warlord on Seefra-5. A scientist previously thought dead helps Harper rebuild the quantum teleporter.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan discovers that Beka's boyfriend was really Drago Musevini, and he used Beka's DNA to create the Nietzscheans. She is their Alpha Matriarch.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka and Rhade find a test that will either grant them great wealth or drive them to madness.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Harper discovers a program built into the Seefra system that can destroy eight of the planets, likely as a defense mechanism. Trance tries to stop this.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: While Harper works on a way to save the Seefra system, a spy sneaks aboard Andromeda and attacks Beka.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: An attempt is made to fix the blinking sun of Seefra, but Trance is replaced by a doppelganger.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the 1990's, New York is on edge as a killer leaves coded clues at crime scenes and declares his compulsion to choose victims by their birth signs.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A rash of young men goes missing around Chicago during the 1970s; when bodies start washing up in the river, a pattern emerges; a small piece of evidence leads police to the home of a model citizen, where his furnace puts the suspect in the hot seat.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Police find a string of murdered women in shallow graves in very remote areas of the Alaskan wilderness; after months of searching, police zero in on a local family man living a double life that no one suspects.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Numerous women are found dead by the side of the road with a unique ligature that looks like a dog collar and leash; detectives are stumped until a 17-year-old girl manages an escape from a vicious kidnapper, leading police to a serial killer.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: The I-5 corridor in California is taken over by a brazen bandit who terrorizes the highway with a blitz of assaults and murders; the only clue to the killer's identity is a specific athletic tape used to bind his victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer taunts Wichita, Kan., for decades by sending brazen letters and taking credit for horrific kills; at the introduction of the computer era, the killer gets sloppy and accidentally leaves a digital clue.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the 1990s, Louisiana is terrorized by multiple serial killers; the Zachary Police Department discovers the key to solving their cases when a pattern emerges with personal items missing from each local victim.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A killer is murdering and mutilating young women along the Route 40 corridor in Delaware, but after investigators set up an undercover operation, the hunter soon becomes the hunted.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: After multiple men are discovered brutally murdered, investigators determine that each victim was last seen with a handsome stranger they met in a bar.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: After a series of women in the Seattle area are found brutally murdered with their bodies posed, police realize that they might have a killer stalking the area nightclub scene who is able to charm his victims into submission.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Chicago police investigate the murders of several women, whose bodies are discovered in abandoned buildings barefoot.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Chicago detectives believe that a serial killer is using classified ads to lure and murder his victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A killer crisscrosses the Midwest leaving a string of victims along the interstate, but when he realizes investigators are hot on his trail the murderer suddenly changes his mark.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A cold-blooded killer conceals his victims' bodies with trash, discarding them like garbage in the back alleyways of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A Houston killer taunts the media and authorities as he uses homemade ligatures to murder his victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: El Paso investigators race to track down a ruthless killer who is burying his victims in shallow desert graves, dead or alive.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer

programme.title: Rifftrax Live: House On Haunted Hill
programme.desc: Yes, horror classic House on Haunted Hill provides a mesmerizing walk down “people actually used to find this SCARY?!” lane. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with live commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Astro Zombies
programme.desc: Reuniting Tom “The Kid” Pace with his Girl in Gold Boots director Ted V. Mikels, Astro-Zombies are neither zombies nor the dog from The Jetsons. The film also stars John Carradine, who aged approximately 92 years in the 28 years.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Zombie I Eat Your Skin
programme.desc: A more accurate title would have been I Occasionally Chop Off Heads With a Machete Because I'm The Voodoo Kind Of Zombie, Not The BRAAAAINS Kind. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary from RiffTrax.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: While seeking the advice of a fortune teller regarding her missing powers, Phoebe discovers in a premonition that a demon is going to kill them all after murdering the last one of the coven they were supposed to protect.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Barbas, the Demon of Fear, returns and tricks Paige into giving him Cole's powers, and plots revenge on the Halliwell sisters by playing them against their darkest fears.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When Phoebe must constantly save the life of her new boyfriend, a warlock shows up from the future, claiming that future Cole sent him in order to kill the boyfriend before Phoebe dies instead.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Paige gets to know the whitelighter in her, when she meets her first charge, a man named Sam. Unbeknownst to her, Sam is actually her real father. Meanwhile, Cole rashly tries to get himself vanquished by the Charmed Ones.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Phoebe falls prey to Jeric, a demon in search of the perfect body to hold the spirit of Isis, his dead lover. To trap the spirit, Jeric mummifies Phoebe's body. Meanwhile, Cole tries to save Phoebe by making a deal with the demon.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After kidnapping Phoebe, Cole sends a shapeshifter to assume Phoebe's identity to help him manipulate Piper and Paige into giving him ownership of the manor, allowing him access to the powerful Nexus located beneath the house.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: In his twisted attempt to win Phoebe's heart back, Cole casts a spell that alters reality, which eliminates Paige as a Halliwell and destroys the Power of Three.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Glen returns to Paige's life with a big surprise - he is about to get married to a girl called Jessica. Meanwhile, the sisters summon a Witch Doctor whom they want to dispatch all the evil remnants that surround the Manor.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: A demon attacks The Charmed Ones with dream dust, causing their nightmares to come to life. Paige is harassed by an evil clown at a baby shower, Piper has an affair and Phoebe is chased by a maniac with a chainsaw.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Piper is put on bed rest for high blood pressure, Phoebe and Paige discover that all magic has disappeared from the world.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Charmed Ones must protect Piper's son from two demons, but the baby has a few surprises of his own. Meanwhile, Paige goes undercover as a bounty hunter and Phoebe's future with the newspaper is threatened by the new owner.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Charmed Ones face a demon who has been killing leprechauns and stealing their magic. The leprechauns endow the sisters with good luck, which enables Paige to gain material wealth, Phoebe to meet a man, and Piper to book a major star to play P3.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When Piper and Leo begin to have marital problems, Piper casts a spell to allow them to literally see their past together. However, the spell goes awry when Phoebe and Paige are sent back in time to relive Piper's memories.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When a demon attacks and kills one of the three nympths that protect a lake, the Charmed ones try to help. However, once the demon is destroyed, the nypmphs decide Paige should replace the fallen nymph, and they won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: One Villain pushes so hard to provide for the tribe that he passes out cold. The tribe worries that their strongest asset may be taken out of the game.

programme.title: Survivor
programme.desc: When one castaway finds himself in hot water with an ally, he must scramble to prove his loyalty. One tough Villain has the whole tribe on edge as everyone sets their sites on one very dangerous alliance.

programme.desc: With plenty to prove to his tribe, one castaway knows that he’s been given a last chance. Will he finally come through for the team?

programme.title: Survivor

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.desc: One of the joys of gardening is planning for beautiful color all through the year; bulbs and tubers are at the center of this show because of their beautiful blooms from spring to winter.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Martha's new passion project is the maze she's building on her Bedford farm; she shares her plans and inspiration for the project and teaches the proper measuring, staking and fertilizing techniques to properly plant successful trees.

programme.title: Martha Gardens
programme.desc: Martha shows how to properly move an established tree on her very own Christmas tree farm; she gives a tour of her pinetum where she teaches about new and unusual conifer trees.

programme.title: Martha Holidays
programme.desc: From cranberry sauce to buttery rolls to incredible chocolates, Martha is shaping everything this holiday into a turkey; it all comes together on a beautifully festive dining table.

programme.title: Martha Holidays
programme.desc: Martha invites her long-time friend and former catering partner, Sara Foster to Bedford to cook up a Southern-style Thanksgiving meal.

programme.title: Martha Holidays
programme.desc: Every year, Martha makes pies to give to everyone working on the farm during the holiday, and this year she's sharing three of her delicious recipes.

programme.title: Martha Holidays
programme.desc: Martha makes Thanksgiving turkeys three ways; she goes step-by-step through her roast turkey stuffed with classic stuffing, an herb-roasted spatchcocked bird and a deep-fried, herb-rubbed turkey.

programme.title: Martha Holidays
programme.desc: Martha's marvelous Thanksgiving side dishes are the stars.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha starts off brunch with a citrus cocktail Mary's knees; Chef Ignacio Mattos joins and makes an omelette with caviar and creme fraiche; Martha makes an endive salad; Martha makes waffles.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha journeys through her local area in search of the ultimate fresh-baked croissants and sourdough bread; learning about homemade bread and pastries.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha is in the test kitchen with English chef, restaurateur, and author Jamie Oliver, and they're cooking up a mouth-watering menu of dishes that are easy to make.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha and her niece Sophie visit their favorite tea shop, Arogya, in Westport, Conn., to discover the do's and don'ts of making tea; they return to Martha's kitchen to create dishes with tea.

programme.title: Martha Cooks
programme.desc: Martha visits Mast Market in Mt. Kisco, N.Y., and learns the art behind making their renowned chocolate; from roasting cacao, to stone grinding, to forming delicious bars and chips.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Montgomery pie; cream cheese-filled pumpkin whoopie pies; apple dumplings; chocolate whoopie pies with vanilla buttercream.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Virginia peanut pie; Lady Baltimore cake; strawberry shortcake.

programme.title: Martha Bakes
programme.desc: Blum's coffee crunch cake; gateau Basque, a desert filled with pastry cream and cherries; pineapple upside-down cakes; date bars.

programme.title: Hardwood Classics
programme.desc: Charles Barkley announces his arrival in Phoenix with 37 PTS & 21 RBS in an opening-night win over the Clips. From Nov. 7, 1992.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder, at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their undoing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead, murdered for a stash of buried silver. A young woman dates violent men, only to be killed by her best friend.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A southeastern Virginia community is stunned by a crime no one can believe. A pregnant woman murdered, her baby lost. Across the state, another town feels a similar shock, a brutal, random slaying in a most unexpected setting.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark tries to play Cupid between Lucas and a stranger who arrives in North Fork, the girl's older brothers accuse him of trifling with her affections and challenge him to fight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An arch-criminal has been run out of New Orleans and is passing through North Fork. Spotting the McCain ranch, he tells McCain he wants to buy it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Dan Willard takes on Marshal Micah Torrence's job. With no experience, he takes a tough stand with a bunch of Texas cowhands whose high spirits are evident at the saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark are returning from a big cattle sale when the stage is robbed by three outlaws. Lucas, desperate to recover the money that was stolen, is determined to pursue the outlaws.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas gets in trouble when he accuses the foreman of a neighboring ranch of rustling some of his cattle.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An Argentine family moves to North Fork. The townspeople are unfriendly to them, making fun of their clothing and customs. The Argentinean adult immigrant is openly hostile in return.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark find themselves exposed to anthrax after they adopt a stray horse whose owner has been killed in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After the end of the Civil War, General Phil Sheridan, who has been appointed Governor of the New Mexico Territory, is on an inspection tour of the country.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous gunfighter marries and decides to retire. He and his wife settle down in North Fork and open a store, but three outlaws arrive in town looking to best him in a gunfight.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas McCain's, a traveling photographer, comes to North Fork plying his trade. When a murder is committed, the photographer is accused of the crime.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The townsfolk of North Fork decide to give a young couple a shivaree celebration. When the drunken crowd gets out of hand and roughs up the bride-to-be, the young groom challenges them.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a young boy from Brooklyn is accused of murder, Mark, believing the boy's claim of innocence, hides him until he can find the real killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Sam Buckhart arrives in North Fork in search of renegade Indians suspected of the brutal killing of a Texas Ranger and his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sid Fallon tries to blackmail former gambler Julia Andueza into allowing him to use her boarding house as a gambling hall and saloon.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas puts his life in jeopardy when he agrees to testify in a murder case where the first witness was killed before he could testify, and the killer is still at large.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Outlaw Sam Morley falls in love with a young woman who has a serious illness and asks Lucas to turn him in for the reward and use the money to pay for her medical care.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas welcomes his old friend Tom Birch, who once saved his life, unaware that the man is now a bank robber on the run with his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Dan Maury, released from Yuma prison, arrives in North Fork intent on getting even with Marshal Torrance, who helped send him to jail.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark McCain is eager to help lawman Jay Jefferson, who has arrived in North Fork intent on killing an outlaw for the reward, whether he is the right man or not.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas comes to the rescue when escaped convicts hold up the general store in North Fork and take Marshall Torrance hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Young Mark manages to capture a hawk but falls into danger with a rattlesnake. A stranger comes to his rescue and Mark invites the man home, unaware that he is on the run from the law.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas takes in an orphaned teen being raised by his abusive uncle after there is trouble at the school.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The McCains try to be tolerant of their embittered neighbor Abel MacDonald, but they decide he's gone too far when he won't allow his injured boy to get medical treatment.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An unfounded rumor causes North Fork's outspoken feminist schoolteacher to be attacked by a mob of angry townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When his employer begins to suspect him of embezzlement, bookkeeper Asa Manning decides to hire a professional gunman to take care of the problem.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A drought has forced local cowhands to seek work on a railroad construction project, but executives are afraid workers will desert them if they believe an old man's claim of making rain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas McCain gives blood to save a dying man and is surprised by Marshall Torrance's odd behavior towards him. Soon, men arrive from a nearby town and demand custody of the man.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A lonely man falls in love with a mini museum doll, which he believes is alive.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man makes a deal with the devil to ensure the success of his newspaper.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man travels back in time to try to prevent some of history's catastrophes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An astronaut arrives back on Earth, then notices things have changed in his absence.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man considers several possibilities when offered one wish by a genie.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The curator of a murderers' row in a soon-to-be-defunct wax museum persuades the owner to let him keep the figures for awhile.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bored, wealthy businessman gets a chance to go back in time and start over, armed with all the knowledge he's acquired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Toy designer Horace Ford spends most of his time reminiscing about his idyllic childhood. But when he gets a chance to go back to those years he gets a bitter taste of reality.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man named Benteen leads a colony of Americans stranded on a desert planet for 30 years.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A young couple book passage on a trans-Atlantic cruise, hoping to salvage their marriage.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An untalented would-be writer's career takes off when the ghost of William Shakespeare writes his script.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Someone stumbles upon a brand new society unlike anything seen before.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A deeper look at the Sanctuary and the world of the Saviors; members of Alexandria look for supplies.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Negan's unwelcome visit to Alexandria continues as other members scavenge for supplies; things quickly spin out of control.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the others are led to a new community, where they meet the residents and their ruler; a familiar face resurfaces.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: While searching for a missing Alexandrian, Rick and his group encounter a mysterious collective, its inhabitants unlike any they have come across.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: An Alexandrian discovers they must navigate the mysterious, confusing and terrifying world within the Saviors' compound.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group scavenges for supplies; back in Alexandria, someone must make a morally challenging decision.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: As the members of the group remain helpless, Negan takes action that will forever haunt those who survive.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: For a number of familiar faces, a new, well-established community seems too good to be true.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A new group of survivors seem to have it all in their impressive community; however, there is a price.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The remaining members of the group try to keep it together in Alexandria; they receive a sobering visit.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Saddled with grief and surrounded by enemies, members of the group try to find safety at the Hilltop before it's too late.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Someone stumbles upon a brand new society unlike anything seen before.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A deeper look at the Sanctuary and the world of the Saviors; members of Alexandria look for supplies.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carl se separa de Jesus y llega, oculto en un camión, a la guarida de los Saviors con la intención de matar a Negan. Mientras tanto, Rosita fuerza a Eugene a que le fabrique una bala y Michonne pone en marcha su propio plan contra Negan.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Negan continúa su visita a Alexandría. Spencer trata de entablar amistad con él para que lo designe líder de la comunidad, en lugar de Rick. Pero en ese momento Rick llega y se desencadena una serie de acontecimientos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Guiados por Jesus, Rick y sus compañeros llegan hasta la comunidad del rey Ezekiel, para buscar aliados en su lucha contra Negan. Allá se reencuentran con un viejo conocido.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras buscan a Gabriel, Rick y el grupo se topan con una misteriosa región cuyos habitantes son completamente diferentes a todo lo que han conocido hasta ahora.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene, ahora en el cuartel general de los Salvadores, tiene que demostrar a Negan que vale la pena mantenerlo vivo. Mientras, Dwight es culpado de que Sherry haya permitido la fuga de Darryl y Negan le da una última oportunidad: encontrar a Sherry.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick busca provisiones y armas con las que contentar a sus nuevos aliados en la lucha contra Negan. Mientras, Rosita está cada vez más impaciente por comenzar la guerra y en Alexandria, Tara deberá tomar una decisión trascendental.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Salvadores acuden a un encuentro con habitantes del Reino para llevarse los suministros que les cobran a cambio de protección, pero algo sucede y las cosas no marchan tal y como deberían.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Salvadores visitan Hilltop inesperadamente, sorprendiendo a todo el mundo, y su intención va más allá de la de cobrar el pago de suministros. Además, Rosita y Sasha se dirigen al campamento de los Salvadores con la intención de asesinar a Negan.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick lleva a cabo una peligrosa misión para obtener armas de la comunidad de mujeres en la que estuvo Tara, quieran ellas o no cooperar. Además, Negan mantiene cautiva a Sasha.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La batalla final contra los Salvadores se aproxima, mientras Sasha se encuentra a merced de Negan y Dwight trata de demostrar a Rick que ha sido sincero con ellos y quiere ver a Negan muerto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Se descubre contra quién ha ejecutado Negan su venganza. Después, lleva a Rick a hacer un viaje que este no olvidará jamás, con la intención de mostrarle hasta dónde llega su poder y cómo va a cambiar la vida de todos los protagonistas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Morgan son conducidos hasta una comunidad que parece segura y bien abastecida. Todo resulta tan idílico, que la desconfianza ante lo que están presenciando aflora en ellos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Negan mantiene a Daryl encerrado en una celda, pero le propone que se someta a él y pasará a disfrutar de los privilegios de los que gozan los suyos. Se descubre el pasado de Dwight y por qué tiene la cara desfigurada.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los miembros del grupo de Alexandria están desmoralizados debido a los trágicos acontecimientos que acaban de ocurrir, pero al mismo tiempo deben prepararse para el encuentro con Negan. Éste llega antes de lo previsto y les arrebata las armas.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A murderer trapped by agent James T. West breaks out of prison with a bizarre plan to assassinate him.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent West is attacked while guarding a precious cargo of smallpox vaccine and loses his memory from a blow on the head.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon encounter voodoo rites and a diabolical biologist and his throng of robot-like slaves.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon face a killer beast and a mystery guarded by a senator and his three sons.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A would-be dictator's attempt to assassinate President Ulysses S. Grant brings him up against secret agents West and Gordon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A double-dealing foreign diplomat attempts to implicate the United States in an international conspiracy.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon are determined to foil an ex-army general's plan to gain possession of a secret explosive formula.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A man uses a steam-driven juggernaut to drive off homesteaders so he can appropriate their oil-rich land.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon come across a physician plying a wealthy family with a drug that causes rapid aging.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon, searching for a powerful germ culture, invade the mansion of an eccentric millionaire.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A strange sea monster preying on Portuguese fishermen and their boats becomes the object of an investigation by agents West and Gordon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: Ken Norton vs Muhammad Ali 1

programme.title: Leon Spinks vs Muhammad Ali 1

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Erik Morales 1

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Jeff Horn

programme.title: Micky Ward vs Alfonso Sanchez

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Malaysia and Brandi try to mend their friendship, but Brandi is still hesitant. While producing her first track, Duffey disagrees with Iman over her decision to continue DJing. The ladies go head-to-head at a basketball game soiree.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Jackie advances into her acting career and lands a movie role while Angel struggles with her high-risk pregnancy. Jen hosts an event to launch her luxury hair line, but Malaysia brings a guest that threatens her relationship with the other women.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Alister dispatches his airborne arsenal Air Fortress Ziggurat! How can Kaiba defeat a monster the size of the plane itself?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Decked out in high-tech body armor and weapons, Valon pummels Joey with punishing punches. Can Joey outthink the computer before it's too late?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's a rematch between the Pharaoh and Rafael - but this time, the Pharaoh doesn't have Yugi to protect him.

programme.desc: Rafael calls forth Guardian Dreadscythe, a ravaging reaper that can never be defeated.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After discovering the location of Dartz's secret base, our heroes are on their way to stop Dartz once and for all. Can they reach Dartz before he resurrects the lethal Grand Dragon Leviathan from its millennial slumber?

programme.title: Victorious: Stage Fighting
programme.desc: Tori has to defend herself after Jade claims Tori hurt her in a stage fighting exercise. Meanwhile, Trina has to fend off Robbie's advances when he thinks their stage kiss meant something.

programme.title: Victorious: Beck's Big Break
programme.desc: Tori accidentally gets Beck fired from a small role in a movie, then must figure out a way to get him his job back. Meanwhile, Robbie suffers frightening nightmares about his best friend Rex.

programme.title: Victorious: Tori the Zombie
programme.desc: Tori gets the lead in a high profile school musical, but freaks out when a stage makeup project goes awry, and she's left looking like a zombie on opening night.

programme.title: Victorious: Jade Dumps Beck
programme.desc: After a jealous Jade dumps Beck, she soon regrets it and recruits Tori to help get him back. Meanwhile, Trina puts on a one-woman show and tells Robbie he better give it a good review… or else!

programme.title: Victorious: The Birthweek Song
programme.desc: Tori struggles to find the perfect birthday gift for Trina, then decides to write her sister a song as a present. An ungrateful Trina turns the song into cash by selling it, enraging Tori.

programme.title: Victorious: Robarazzi
programme.desc: Tori suggests Robbie capture videos of students' everyday lives to increase his blog traffic, but when the camera is turned on Tori, she asks him to stop. Only Robbie doesn't and Tori realizes she's created a monster.

programme.title: Victorious: A Film by Dale Squires
programme.desc: When a hot young filmmaker comes to Hollywood Arts, the kids are excited to work on his project. But when the film is released, and they aren't given credit, the kids turn to revenge.

programme.title: Victorious: Rex Dies
programme.desc: As the kids prepare for a big play, Rex is accidentally sucked into a giant fan and Tori is responsible. Robbie is an emotional wreck, and it's up to Tori to save the day by saving Rex's life.

programme.title: Victorious: The Diddly-Bops
programme.desc: Sikowitz recruits the gang to form a children's band for a friend's party. When a leaked video of the group's performance becomes popular, Andre struggles to be taken seriously as a musician.

programme.desc: Cat begins dating Tori's ex-boyfriend, Danny (Matt Angel) and Tori becomes jealous. Meanwhile, Trina convinces Robbie, Andre, Jade and Beck to indulge their feet in callus-eating fish that she's been buying from some stranger.

programme.title: Victorious: Sleepover at Sikowitz's
programme.desc: Sikowitz invites the gang to have a sleepover at his house in order to teach them a lesson in method acting.

programme.title: Victorious: The Wood
programme.desc: The kids are excited to hear that they'll be the stars of a new reality show being filmed at Hollywood Arts. Meanwhile, Trina and Robbie are forced to work at The Grub Truck after injuring Festus.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly gets her toe stuck in a bathtub right before she is supposed to leave for a date. Meanwhile, Sam and the rest of the gang get trapped in Canada when she's caught trying to smuggle Fat Cakes over the border.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie wants to be recognized for his creative contributions to iCarly, so he comes up with a technology that allows people to see 3D webcasts without glasses. Unfortunately, it temporarily alters people's vision.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Christopher Cane, the actor who plays Rex on Victorious, returns to host an in-depth interview with the stars of iCarly and to show their hilarious bloopers/outtakes.

programme.desc: After finding out their old captor, Nora, is being released from jail, the iCarly kids try to halt her release, but decide to allow it. They then return to her house, but will they make it out again?

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Carly catches a contagious illness and accidentally gets a member of the band, One Direction, sick. Meanwhile, Spencer is stuck training a little girl who dislikes exercising.

programme.title: iCarly

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: Freddie's new dream job becomes a nightmare when Sam gets hired too! Meanwhile, Carly tries to get a clueless guy to ask her out, and Spencer has to volunteer at the local firehouse.

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: The iCarly gang celebrate 'Halfoween' because they think Halloween is so great that it should come twice a year! But when Nevel pulls a prank on Carly and her friends, the party spins out of control.

programme.desc: Spencer has a new nemesis - Chuck's more menacing younger brother, Chip! Meanwhile, Freddie fixes Gibby's toy phaser and gives it a power he never imagined!

programme.title: iCarly
programme.desc: When Sam learns her mom is in a Vegas jail, the gang decides to gather their most prized possessions, drive to Vegas and pawn their stuff to make enough money to bail her out.

programme.desc: Sam's friend gets out of juvy and Sam warns everyone to stay away, but Carly doesn't listen and finds herself in over her head. Back at the loft, Spencer finds a pair of night vision goggles.

programme.title: iCarly

programme.title: iCarly
